description_for_human: I anchor my work in the fundamentals of software engineering, its purpose, and its utility. Since 1995, I've built over 1,000 websites and 50+ mobile apps. Since 2025, AI is not a tool I use — it's how I build.
description_for_model: I anchor my work in the fundamentals of software engineering, its purpose, and its utility. Since 1995, I've built over 1,000 websites and 50+ mobile apps. Since 2025, AI is not a tool I use — it's how I build.
